Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Clainms And Inappropriate Count Under Ccp 846
Off Calendar Dec-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT JOSEPH SCHOEPP, JULIANNE SCHOEPP'S Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Claims And Inappropriate Count Under Ccp 846 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (Prevailing party to submit form of order.) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Joyce Long CSR#:8620 (301/PHA)
